title: eurlex-builder: a configurable Python pipeline for EU legislative datasets
description: eurlex-builder turns the EUR-Lex / Cellar corpus into provision-level Parquet tables for quantitative research. It fetches directives, regulations, decisions, and communications, extracts text at configurable granularity (article, numbered paragraph, or lettered point) across EUR-Lex's heterogeneous document formats, collects metadata and inter-document relations, and includes guarded Opus-MT translation for non-English documents. Output is one DuckDB file plus four Parquet tables. The package accompanies Seidl and Kosti (2026), "Mapping Europe's Digital Acquis: A Granular History of EU Digital Policymaking".
